title: olynthia disticha
side_effects: Olynthia disticha can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Long-term use or high doses of Olynthia disticha can also cause liver and kidney damage, as well as interact with medications, potentially exacerbating health conditions. Furthermore, improper preparation or handling of the plant can lead to contamination, which may cause infections and other serious health complications.
